purpose: Core patient context without making diagnosis
key_fields: patient_id, language, communication preferences, accessibility needs, consent flags, cultural-safety preferences
privacy_safety_notes: Avoid inferred identity labels; patient-controlled visibility where possible

key_fields: episode_id, status, owner, open_questions, linked encounters/tests/referrals, closure reason
encounter_id, setting, arrival time, first handler, triage level, chief concern, disposition
symptom, onset, duration, severity, baseline change, function impact, location, triggers, red flags

privacy_safety_notes: Respectful display; original preserved but summarized for clinician

key_fields: prior cancer/condition, family history, surgeries, rare disease/genetic history, relevance tags
privacy_safety_notes: Relevance ranking; avoid permanent irrelevant alerts

purpose: Medication and access as diagnostic context
key_fields: medication, last_taken, interruption reason, cost/transport/device barriers, support referral
privacy_safety_notes: Neutral wording; do not blame patient

key_fields: vitals, abnormal flags, physical exam limitation, visible distress, triage notes
privacy_safety_notes: Capture true arrival and reassessment timestamps

key_fields: test, indication, ordered_by, expected_result_time, pending_at_discharge, availability/provenance
result_id, value/finding, abnormality, criticality, date, source lab/radiology, test limitations
privacy_safety_notes: Distinguish normal result from symptom resolution

key_fields: owner, due_date, acknowledged, action_taken, patient_notified, escalation, closure
requested_service, reason, triage status, missing_info, booked, attended, report_returned, barriers
privacy_safety_notes: Do not mark complete until report/next step returned

key_fields: pending_tests, red_flags, return_instructions, follow_up_owner, appointment, patient_understanding
privacy_safety_notes: Emergency instructions separate from portal messages

key_fields: check_in_date, symptoms_resolved, worse/new red flags, patient_response, escalation_status
privacy_safety_notes: Use targeted cadence to avoid fatigue
Avoid adversarial framing; triage urgent concerns

key_fields: facility, test/supply availability, stockout, fallback plan, timestamp, manager escalation
CHW/provider, danger signs, referral reason, facility, attendance, counter-referral, supervision
alert_shown, override, closure, false_positive/negative review, diagnostic outcome, patient-reported trust
privacy_safety_notes: Monitor harm, bias, alert burden, and missed cases
